bottleneck_analysis.name: Reflection Overhead in Processor
bottleneck_analysis.description: getFieldValue() uses Method.getMethod() + invoke() per column
bottleneck_analysis.mechanism: Java reflection overhead when accessing CsvEstatisticaRow fields
bottleneck_analysis.solution_primary: Use MethodHandle or code-gen to replace reflection
bottleneck_analysis.solution_alternative: Cache MethodHandle instances, reuse across rows

bottleneck_analysis.name: Network Latency (AWS ↔ Locaweb)
bottleneck_analysis.description: SQL write per chunk dominated by round-trip latency
bottleneck_analysis.mechanism: Each chunk = 1 SQL INSERT with 1.3k rows; 249 separate round-trips
bottleneck_analysis.solution_primary: Async ItemWriter or Stored Procedure (batch all 249 calls)
bottleneck_analysis.solution_alternative: Parallel chunks with connection pool tuning

bottleneck_analysis.name: Chunk Management Overhead
bottleneck_analysis.description: Spring Batch context switching, JdbcBatchItemWriter setup, commit overhead
bottleneck_analysis.mechanism: 249 chunks = 249 context switches, commits, metadata writes
bottleneck_analysis.solution_alternative: Parallel chunks to reduce sequential overhead

optimization_recommendations.title: Eliminate Reflection Overhead
optimization_recommendations.description: Replace getFieldValue() reflection with MethodHandle or code-gen
optimization_recommendations.proposed_implementation: MethodHandle cache or compile-time code generation

optimization_recommendations.title: Increase Chunk Size
optimization_recommendations.description: Change chunk-size from 50 to 500 rows to reduce per-chunk overhead
optimization_recommendations.note: Can be implemented independently after Fix 1

optimization_recommendations.title: Async ItemWriter or Stored Procedure
optimization_recommendations.description: Eliminate sequential SQL round-trips via pipelining or bulk execution
optimization_recommendations.proposed_implementation_b: Stored Procedure for batch UPSERT (all 1.3k rows in single call)
optimization_recommendations.note: Option B (Stored Proc) is lower-risk if Locaweb supports it

optimization_recommendations.title: Parallel Chunk Processing
optimization_recommendations.description: Enable multi-threaded chunk processing (only if <5min absolute target required)
optimization_recommendations.current_implementation: Serial chunks (1 chunk at a time)
optimization_recommendations.proposed_implementation: Spring Batch parallel step with 3-5 worker threads
optimization_recommendations.note: HIGH RISK — only attempt if critical business requirement

cumulative_improvement_roadmap.description: Eliminate reflection + Increase chunk size + Async/SP

target_analysis.achieving_5min_target: REQUIRES all of Fixes 1-4 + additional optimization (e.g., database indexing)
target_analysis.recommendation: Set realistic target to <2h (120x reduction from baseline)

sprint_2_week_2_3.testing: Async retry logic + idempotence + FK validation

sprint_3_optional_week_4.testing: Parallel deadlock testing + concurrent UPSERT validation
sprint_3_optional_week_4.note: Only if 5min target is absolute business requirement

files_created.purpose: Detailed technical analysis in JSON format
Executive summary and phased implementation plan
